sections.paragraph:
βιβλαρίδιον, ου, τό dim. of βίβλος (Galen XVI p. 5 K. has βιβλιαρίδιον) a small document with writing, little scroll/roll containing a message Rv 10:2, vs. 8 v.l., 9f (s. Mussies 116 on the textual trad.; cp. Artem. 2, 45 p. 149, 6: ἐσθίειν βιβλία in a dream … θάνατον σύντομον προαγορεύει); Hv 2, 1, 3. Of a letter 2, 4, 3. The form βιβλιδάριον (Aristoph. acc. to Pollux 7, 210; Arrian [II a.d.] βιβλιδάριον περὶ κομητῶν, ascribed to Agatharchides [II b.c.] 111 [GGM I 194]; Cat. Cod. Astr. VIII/3, p. 92, 9) appears as v.l. for βιβλαρίδιον in Rv and Hermas; s. AWikenhauser, BZ 6, 1908, 171.—DELG s.v. βύβλος. TW.

dim. dim. = diminutive

Galen Galen , II a.d.—List 5

Mussies Mussies = GM., The Morphology of Koine Greek—List 6

trad. trad. = tradition

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Artem Artem , onir., II a.d.—List 5

Hv Hv = Visions

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

acc. to acc. to = according to

Pollux Pollux , II a.d.—List 5

Arrian Arrian = Flavius Arrianus, I–II a.d.—List 5

Agatharchides Agatharchides , of Cnidus, II b.c.—List 5

GGM GGM = Geographi Graeci Minores, various dates—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Hermas Hermas , s. H—List 1

BZ BZ = Biblische Zeitschrift—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 176
